untranslatable_reason: Signal GRIMES_DRY_3_0 requires swing detection and trendline construction logic that cannot be expressed using only price-level comparisons and standard technical indicators. The rule requires: (1) identification of successive market swings with configurable amplitude and duration thresholds, (2) geometric trendline fitting through multiple swing points, (3) validation that price bodies do not penetrate the trendline, and (4) tracking of swing structure continuity. These are structural/geometric operations on candlestick patterns and fitted lines, not point-in-time indicator comparisons. The allowed indicator set does not include swing-detection functions, trendline drawing capabilities, or geometric validation operators.
translation_notes: This signal describes a trendline construction methodology rather than a tradeable entry/exit rule. It is a structural framework for identifying trend context. All four parameter thresholds ([THRESHOLD_NEEDED]) were left undefined in the source, making concrete rule instantiation impossible. To translate this signal, a swing-detection indicator library and geometric line-fitting functions would be required outside the current allowed indicator set.
